# AI SaaS Monorepo Documentation

Welcome to the documentation center for the autonomous AI-generated platform.

### Table of Contents

1. [Architecture Overview](./architecture-overview.md)
   *Detailed breakdown of the pnpm workspaces, decoupled logic layers, and project scale constraints.*

2. [Agent System](./agent-system.md)
   *How the 5 dedicated sub-agents (DEV, QA, REFACTOR, PR, DOC) are implemented and operate under the message queue.*

3. [Autonomous Coding Loop](./autonomous-coding-loop.md)
   *Understanding the orchestration engine and closed feedback loops generated by the Docker verification sandbox constraint logic.*

4. [Development Workflow](./development-workflow.md)
   *A guide to spinning up the local environment, writing modules using the custom built CLI Generator, and using testing suites (Vitest & Playwright).*

5. [Deployment Guide](./deployment-guide.md)
   *Best practices, platform requirements mappings, and instructions on CI/CD production distributions utilizing GitHub Actions, Vercel, and Cloud instances.*
